name: Beef and Vegetable Fried Rice
recipeIngredient: 1 Red Bell Pepper, Cut Into 1/2-Inch Pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, brown the ground beef, garlic, and ginger over medium heat until the beef is no longer pink and has broken up into 3/4-inch crumbles. Remove with a slotted spoon and set aside.
2. Pour off any drippings from the skillet.
3. Heat the water in the same skillet over medium-high heat until hot. Add the bell pepper and pea pods; cook for 3 minutes or until the bell pepper is crisp-tender, stirring occasionally.
4. Add the rice, soy sauce, and sesame oil to the skillet. Mix well.
5. Return the beef to the skillet and continue heating through for about 5 minutes.
6. Stir in the green onions just before serving.
7. This recipe serves 4 people.
